violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety certified with RIDOH. Application printed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of bio-film. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC elected disposal of ice. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving under the bar have an accumulation of old rodent droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025
